# section 1: Condition.wait timeout (no notifier)
got= False
elapsed_ok= True
# section 2: Condition.wait notified before timeout
got= True
# section 3: Condition.wait_for predicate satisfied
wait_for_ok= True
# section 4: Condition.wait_for timeout (predicate stays False)
wait_for_result= False
elapsed_ok= True
# section 5: Event.wait timeout / set / clear
wait_unset= False elapsed_ok= True
wait_set= True
wait_cleared= False
# section 6: Semaphore.acquire timeout
acquire_empty= False elapsed_ok= True
acquire_released= True
# section 7: Barrier.wait timeout breaks the barrier
BrokenBarrierError
broken= True
done
